chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-02 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.07/2026 2. For hearing of main case 23.01.2026 Mr. Haroon Shah, Advocate for the petitioner Ms. Nareeta Hassan, Advocate and Mr. Muhammad Arsal, Manager Internal, (Legal Surjani) K-Electric ---------------------- Learned counsel for the respondent K Electric files compliance report, taken on record, and submits that the electricity supply has been restored therefore purpose of this petition has been served hence seeks disposal. Learned counsel for the petitioner agitates that the supply to the premises has been restored from the other feeder and that a wrong bill has been issued to the petitioner. As far as wrong bill and supply of electricity from other feeder are concerned, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the Electric Inspector alongwith application. Once an application is submitted before the Electric Inspector, he shall conduct an inquiry into the matter and submit his report before this Court within one week’s time. In view hereof, instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
